name: Festival du Voyageur
description: The largest French-language winter festival in Western Canada. Fort Gibralter, snow sculptures, live music, tourtière.

name: Winnipeg Folk Festival
description: One of the world's great outdoor music festivals. Seven stages, 80+ artists, Birds Hill Park.

name: Folklorama
description: The world's longest-running and largest multicultural festival. 40+ cultural pavilions across the city.

name: Jazz Winnipeg Festival
description: 10 days of world-class jazz across Exchange District venues, outdoor stages, and intimate clubs.

name: Nuit Blanche Winnipeg
description: All-night arts festival with free installations, performances, and open studios across the city.

name: Winnipeg Fringe Theatre Festival
description: Second largest fringe festival in North America. 170+ companies, 700+ performances over 11 days.

name: Winnipeg Santa Claus Parade
description: One of Canada's largest Santa Claus parades. A beloved Winnipeg tradition since 1909.
